project_identity.name: Mohammad Hasan Suthar Portfolio
project_identity.aesthetic: Premium Stripe/Apple-inspired, Dark Mode, Futuristic, Glassmorphism
project_identity.core_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Density where it matters, breathing room where it counts.

rules: NEVER use Inter for Headings (h1, h2, h3). Use Plus Jakarta Sans.
Use JetBrains Mono for skill badges, code snippets, and technical metrics.
Headings must use tight tracking (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
Body text should have relaxed line-height (leading-relaxed).

gradients.hero_text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-400 via-purple-400 to-cyan-400

grid_system.projects: Bento Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Mix spans (col-span-2) for variety.
grid_system.skills: Flex wrap with gap-3 for badges, or grid for categorized lists.

elements: CTA Buttons with 'tracing beam' or glow effect

About.image_style: Rounded-2xl with subtle purple glow shadow

Projects.hover_effect: Scale up (1.02) + Border Glow + Image Zoom
Projects.content: Project Title, Tech Stack (Badges), Short Description, Links (GitHub/Live)

Skills.visual: Glass cards with icon + name. Use 'lucide-react' icons.

Timeline.cards: Alternate left/right on desktop, single column on mobile.

assets.icons: lucide-react (Use for UI elements), react-icons (For brand logos like React, Node, etc.)

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. CONFIG: Create/Update 'tailwind.config.js' to include the fonts and colors defined in this JSON. Ensure 'content' covers all src files.
3. CLEANUP: Delete 'App.css' contents. Move styles to Tailwind classes.
4. COMPONENTS: Refactor existing components in '/app/src/Components/' to use the new design system. Do not delete them, but rewrite their return JSX and logic.
5. DARK MODE: Implement a toggle using a React Context or simple state that adds a 'dark' class to the HTML tag. Default to DARK.
6. PRESERVE: Keep existing text content (Bio, Experience details) but wrap them in the new UI.
7. IMAGES: Use the Unsplash URLs provided for backgrounds/placeholders. Use existing assets from '/app/src/assests/' for specific project logos/screenshots if they exist.
8. ANIMATION: Use framer-motion for smooth entrance animations (AnimatePresence not required for simple scroll reveals).
9. FILE TYPE: Use .js and .jsx extensions only. Do not convert to TSX.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
